text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to get Air Groove back on her feet. In
order to do that, I first need to find a chance to
talk to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I still have no idea what I should say to her, but
for the time being, I tell her I simply want to talk.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What's the big idea? Why did you call me here?
choice_data_list: I need you to wake up.
I need you to wake up.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: And what is that supposed to mean?
choice_data_list: I thought we were going to surpass Suzuka.
I thought we were going to surpass Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I need to overtake her. So why am I
like this?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I think... for the first time in my life, I'm scared.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
When I witness her running... I can't even picture
myself surpassing it, and that terrifies me!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The way she runs is like nothing I've ever seen.
Free as a bird, with peerless speed that touches
the hearts of all watching.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
After experiencing it for myself on the track, I can
understand all too well. Those who see that pure
and unfettered running...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...can't help but feel inspired.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: On the other hand, there's me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All this time, I have raced as the Empress in order
to be an ideal for all Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But with the way things are now... I wonder if
there's any meaning to my efforts.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: They already have Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The ideal I strove to embody—the Umamusume
who inspires others to dream—is already standing
right before me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
In the face of that... what is there left for me to
do?
choice_data_list: You and Suzuka aren't the same.
You and Suzuka aren't the same.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?
choice_data_list:
You have something that only you can show
everyone.

You have something that only you can show
everyone.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Something... only I can...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've journeyed so far with Air Groove, watching
her closely from her side.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've been the closest one to her and the one most
enraptured by her running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why I feel certain that this is something
only I can tell her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's right. Air Groove is...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: A... challenger, you say?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Air Groove exactly how she's appeared to
me up until now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "To become the ideal for all Umamusume."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the very beginning, Air Groove has been
constantly challenging herself to achieve this
incredibly grand ambition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has always remained disciplined, always
looking forward, in order to live up to this ideal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She guides the academy as student council vice
president. She guides the younger students as
their senior. And all the while, she's continued to
run in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've watched her every step of the way. And it's
not just me—all the Umamusume at the academy
can testify to her efforts too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies and the Triple Tiara
series, she refused to falter, give up, or look
back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's always been the proud Empress, constantly
challenging herself with her eyes fixed on her
dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Don't rest on your laurels." "I need to aim for
ever greater heights."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "That's why you need to stick with me."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
These are a handful of the things Air Groove has
said as she continues to move forward and
challenge herself. That's why she's the Empress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has always been the undaunted challenger,
striving tirelessly to be every Umamusume's ideal!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I didn't realize that was how you saw me...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: He isn't the only one, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: She isn't the only one, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have also been watching you, and I feel exactly
the same way.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I came here because I have something I want to
show you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf leads us to the area of the beach
where students train during summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Take a look, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I can still... keep going!

text_block_list.name: Summer Camp Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I'm sooo tired!

text_block_list.name: Summer Camp Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe Air Groove did this regimen last
year... She's tough as nails!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's why we need to keep going! We need to
work even harder if we're ever going to surpass
her!

text_block_list.name: Summer Camp Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: You said it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Heeey, Dober! You still at it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're really hittin' it recently. I hope you're not
overdoing it. How you feeling?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for looking out for me, but I'm okay. I'm
not overdoing it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm challenging myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm challenging my own limits.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Dober...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'll be back soon. See you back there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Come on, everyone! We can keep going!

text_block_list.name: Summer Camp Students
text_block_list.text: YEAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Your energy is infectious, Dober. You've
hooked me as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's it! I'm joining you guys! Let's pump our
muscles to the max!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Dober...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Do you understand now?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They're all chasing after the Empress. You, Air
Groove.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They've seen you take on challenge after
challenge and have been inspired by you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
When they struggle and fall down, it is you, as
their ideal, that pushes them to stand up once
more.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They stand back up and challenge themselves to
achieve glory on their own two feet.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As president of Tracen Academy's student
council, I owe you my thanks.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for guiding our younger
students.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I must be going now. I'll leave you two alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf walks away, leaving us in silence.
But I know exactly what to say to Air Groove now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Indeed.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No matter how high the wall that blocks my way, I
need only keep challenging myself without fear or
hesitation.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That is how I can demonstrate...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...No, that is how I have always demonstrated my ideal to the world!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I want to challenge Suzuka once more. So that I
can remain the ideal everyone strives toward.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Will you stick with me?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's why you're my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Preparations for our rematch against Silence
Suzuka begin now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First, we need to get back in the game at the
Sapporo Kinen and show everyone that the
Empress is as strong as ever!
